message:
fix(freeze): reduce frozen code size for large codebases

- Set DISPATCH_TABLE_THRESHOLD to 10000 (use comptime switch instead of
  runtime dispatch tables for most functions)
- This reduces generated code size by ~37% (217MB -> 138MB for TSC)
- Add frozen_optimize_arg with ReleaseSafe to reduce LLVM memory pressure
- Increase bytecode read limit to 1GB for large bundles

Note: This reduces but does not eliminate LLVM compilation issues for
very large frozen modules. A proper fix requires sharded compilation
where each shard is compiled as a separate object file.
